title: Upper Bal'ta'ran Cluster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Upper Bal'ta'ran Cluster''' was a cluster of islands in [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]], in the northwest coast of [[L'Quar'ta|l'Quart'a]] continent. The [[u'Tal'ac Range]] was located there.

There were several mines located in the cluster of islands that produced [[Bal'ta'ran crystal]]s. These mines were operated primarily by [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrian]] slaves; [[Aul Tarrus Vishav]] was born and raised as one such slave on the islands until he managed to escape his life of servitude.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
